candidates.name: default_precision
candidates.description: Current best single-candidate high-precision preprocess baseline from optimization3 Steps 02-06.

candidates.name: face_focus_highres
candidates.description: Higher analysis resolution plus more conservative face rerun and tighter face tracking.

candidates.name: motion_focus_highres
candidates.description: Higher analysis resolution plus stronger multiscale pose/motion smoothing and local refine.

candidates.name: boundary_background_highres
candidates.description: Higher analysis resolution plus stronger background stabilization and wider transition support for difficult boundaries.
